name: jira.issue.create
description: Create a Jira Cloud issue. Description and any rich-text custom fields accept plain text — the plugin wraps them in Atlassian Document Format automatically.

configRefs.name: jira
configRefs.description: Generic config containing host (https://acme.atlassian.net), email, apiToken.

issueType.description: Issue type name, e.g. 'Task', 'Bug', 'Story'. Defaults to 'Task'.

description.description: Issue description body. Plain text gets wrapped into ADF; pass a stringified ADF object to forward as-is.

assignee.description: Assignee accountId (NOT email — Jira Cloud requires accountId).

issue.description: Jira's create response: { id, key, self }.

url.description: Browser URL of the created issue.
